text: I prefer to make decisions after I’ve checked the facts.
I value solutions that are backed up by clear logic.
I like to understand things by examining the details.
I frequently look for data to confirm if something is true.
I often look for inconsistencies in how something is explained.
I prefer information that’s explained step by step.
I value having clear procedures in my work.
I like to have a plan before I take action.
I frequently bring order to unclear information.
I often feel best when I know what’s happening next.
I prefer exploring new perspectives rather than familiar ones.
I value ideas that question predictable ways of thinking.
I like conversations that imagine new possibilities.
I frequently connect ideas to come up with something new.
I often imagine future possibilities even if they aren’t practical.
I prefer conversations that create real connection with others.
I value ideas that help people understand each other.
I like to think through ideas with people I trust.
I frequently consider other people’s views before I share my own.
I often pick up on subtle cues in group settings.
